events.title: Listening to the Body
events.teaser: Release what's been waiting for your attention.
events.description: A guided evening of embodied presence: gentle pair connection, a deep body-listening meditation, and grounded sharing. You'll leave with more clarity, softness, and inner space—without forcing anything.

events.title: Inner Compass Night
events.teaser: Hear the difference between mind, gut, and heart.
events.description: We explore what becomes possible when conversation is structured with care. Through rotating pair questions and a simple inner-guidance practice, you'll reconnect with what you already know—then re-enter life with more steadiness.

events.title: Mirrors & Gifts
events.teaser: A night of seeing—and being seen—beautifully.
events.description: A warm, imaginative evening where we practice affirming connection. After guided pair work, you'll offer and receive a gentle 'reading' of strengths, qualities, and gifts—held as playful intuition, not certainty.

events.title: New Earth Conversations
events.teaser: Expand the frame. Keep it human.
events.description: A guided dialogue evening using New Earth themes as inspiration. We explore paradigm shifts, meaning, and the world we're choosing to build—without pressure to agree and without losing our grounding.
